'''saburu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wackadoo|wackadoo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wackadoo|wackadoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| saburu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbirith|sæbirith]] || [[word:sæbirij|sæbirij]] || [[word:sæbirish|sæbirish]] || [[word:sæbiri|sæbiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabuburuth|sabuburuth]] || [[word:sabuburuj|sabuburuj]] || [[word:sabuburush|sabuburush]] || [[word:sabuburu|sabuburu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:saburuth|saburuth]] || [[word:saburuj|saburuj]] || [[word:saburush|saburush]] || [[word:saburu|saburu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabufruth|sabufruth]] || [[word:sabufruj|sabufruj]] || [[word:sabufrush|sabufrush]] || [[word:sabufruf|sabufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:saburuthu|saburuthu]] || [[word:saburuju|saburuju]] || [[word:saburushu|saburushu]] || [[word:saburuku|saburuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:saburuth|saburuth]] || [[word:saburuj|saburuj]] || [[word:saburush|saburush]] || [[word:saburu|saburu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:saburuthul|saburuthul]] || [[word:saburujul|saburujul]] || [[word:saburushul|saburushul]] || [[word:saburukul|saburukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:saburuthuthu|saburuthuthu]] || [[word:saburujuju|saburujuju]] || [[word:saburushushu|saburushushu]] || [[word:saburuku|saburuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:saburuthun|saburuthun]] || [[word:saburujun|saburujun]] || [[word:saburushun|saburushun]] || [[word:saburukun|saburukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:saburuthuoro|saburuthuoro]] || [[word:saburujuoro|saburujuoro]] || [[word:saburushuoro|saburushuoro]] || [[word:saburukuoro|saburukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
